name: binjaXfrida
description: Generate Frida scripts directly from Binary Ninja
longdescription: A Binary Ninja plugin that generates ready-to-use Frida instrumentation snippets. Right-click on functions, addresses, or branches to generate hook scripts, negate conditional branches, modify section protections, and more. Generated scripts are automatically copied to your clipboard.
